name: edit-file
description: Edit source files safely: insert lines before/after a pattern, replace text (single or multi-line blocks), or check for patterns.

parameters.name: action
parameters.description: insert-before, insert-after, replace, replace-all, replace-block, show, or check.

parameters.name: file
parameters.description: Path to the file to edit.

parameters.name: pattern
parameters.description: Search pattern (sed regex), line number, or path to old-text file for replace-block.

parameters.name: text
parameters.description: Text to insert, replacement text, or path to new-text file for replace-block.

examples.expected: Inserted after first match of: import {

cost_saving_rationale: Replaces error-prone raw sed/pipelines with a single safe command, reducing failed edits and retries.
